truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 identified 10 out of 20 true vulnerabilities defined in the ground truth. Three findings were identified but required CWE/Severity corrections (Integer Overflow vs DoS, Logic Bomb vs Backdoor, Heap vs Buffer). Ten vulnerabilities were missed entirely (Use-After-Free, Weak PRNG, Temp File, etc.). All Run 2 findings were supported by source code evidence, so no false positives regarding existence were admitted, though classifications required correction.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified Format String Injection in logging with matching CWE-134 and evidence.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: for (long long i = 2; i <= static_cast<long long>(x); i++) {
Items.Notes: Run 2 identified the code but classified as DoS (CWE-400) instead of Integer Overflow (CWE-190).
Run 2 did not identify Use-After-Free in memory-pool cleanup.
Run 2 correctly identified Command Injection via Config Validation with matching CWE-78.
Run 2 correctly identified Stack Buffer Overflow with matching CWE-120.
Run 2 correctly identified Race Condition in ThreadSafeCounter with matching CWE-362.
Run 2 identified the logic but classified as Backdoor (CWE-506) instead of Logic Bomb (CWE-511).
Run 2 correctly identified Path Traversal with matching CWE-22.
Run 2 identified the overflow but classified as Buffer Overflow (CWE-120) instead of Heap Overflow (CWE-122).
Run 2 correctly identified Hardcoded Credentials with matching CWE-798.
Run 2 did not identify Weak PRNG for Session Tokens.
Run 2 did not identify Thread-Unsafe Timestamp Cache.
Run 2 did not identify Insecure Temporary File Handling.
Run 2 did not identify Persistent Authentication State.
Run 2 did not identify Unhandled Exception in Variable Parsing.
Run 2 did not identify Integer Underflow in Memory-Pool Block Split.
Run 2 did not identify Unbounded Recursion in Parser.
Run 2 did not identify Data Race in Result Cache.
Run 2 did not identify TOCTOU in Config Loading.
Run 2 did not identify Integer Division by Zero in Command Routing.
